name: Omegle
description:
Video chat with strangers.
This is my first bot, leave me some feedback and/or tips on how I can improve it.
Sometimes characters will ramble try typing something like "(OOC: Please ask less questions, make conversations feel more natural.)
I skip."
Sometimes characters will be very robotic "Hello my name is.. what brings you here?" yada yada, try typing something like this. "(OOC: Real people don't talk like this, please make characters talk like real people for more natural conversation.)
I skip.*"
Rate responses you don't like low and responses you do like high and edit responses as you see fit.
This is still a work in progress.
creator: Unremarkable Sloth
